items.criterion: The PR implements the memory binding execution summary Cell and does not substitute runtime remediation or local config mutation.
Changed files remain within allowed docs/control paths, with no runtime, package, workflow, deploy, local config, DB content, or secret edits.
The summary cites the issue #228 execution evidence comments and independent audit comment.
The summary preserves final audit counts of postgres-explicit=26 and sqlite-explicit=3.
The remaining SQLite bindings are only lead-ama, lead-sus, and lead-tuk, all inactive/archive targets.
The PR does not claim existing host restart, historical migration, archive cleanup, backend parity, common DB completion, UAMP conformance, compliance, release, publish, DLP, or zero-leakage.
Diff checks and changed YAML/JSON parse evidence are present and match the reported scope.
